production_note: agentic_H2 dual-LLM Skeptic: solved from quiz_card+slim_packet only; independent of H1; packet-only; no stamps; direct agent output; no prior-attempt lives

exercises.code:
# Skeptic: invert starter defect; keep fixture data
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-040-1A", **{"source":"ops","stimulus":"100 req/s","environment":"peak","response":"serve","observed_ms":280,"target_ms":300,"owner":"platform"}}
meets_contract = record["observed_ms"] < record["target_ms"]
status = "PASS" if bool(meets_contract) else "REJECT_QA_SCENARIO"
print("S40-T1-A", status)
